top_stories.title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
top_stories.description: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.
top_stories.author: Connie Loizos
top_stories.content: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.

top_stories.title: From commit to cloud: Powering what’s next for PostgreSQL
top_stories.description: PostgreSQL has become foundational to how modern applications are built. It powers everything from early‑stage startups to some of the most demanding production systems in the world. Its longevity isn’t accidental, it’s the result of decades of engineering discipline, community collaboration, and a relentless focus on correctness and extensibility. The post From commit to cloud: Powering what’s next for PostgreSQL appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog.
top_stories.author: Shireesh Thota
top_stories.content: PostgreSQL has become foundational to how modern applications are built. It powers everything from early‑stage startups to some of the most demanding production systems in the world. Its longevity isn’t accidental, it’s the result of decades of engineering discipline, community collaboration, and a relentless focus on correctness and extensibility. The post From commit to cloud: Powering what’s next for PostgreSQL appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog.

top_stories.title: From siloed data to unified insights: Cross-account Athena Access for Amazon Quick
top_stories.description: Today, we're announcing cross-account Athena access for Amazon Quick. With this feature, customers can query Athena data in other AWS accounts using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role chaining, with query costs billed to the account where the data resides.
top_stories.author: Vignessh Baskaran
top_stories.content: Today, we're announcing cross-account Athena access for Amazon Quick. With this feature, customers can query Athena data in other AWS accounts using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role chaining, with query costs billed to the account where the data resides.

top_stories.title: Build real-time voice streaming applications with Amazon Nova Sonic and WebRTC
top_stories.description: Building end-to-end live streaming applications with real-time voice interaction presents several challenges. This post introduces a solution based on Amazon Nova 2 Sonic (Nova Sonic) and Amazon Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC (WebRTC) that addresses these challenges. In this post, we’ll walk through the solution architecture, implementation patterns, and two real-world scenario examples.
top_stories.author: Zihang Huang
top_stories.content: Building end-to-end live streaming applications with real-time voice interaction presents several challenges. top_stories.title: How to Build an MCP Style Routed AI Agent System with Dynamic Tool Exposure Planning, Execution, and Context Injection
top_stories.description: In this tutorial, we build a fully functional MCP-style routed agent system from scratch, combining tool discovery, intelligent routing, structured planning, and execution into a single cohesive workflow.
